action_set_definitions.name: get_system_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current telemetry and environmental state of the telescope and its sensors.

action_set_definitions.name: set_tracking_target
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the tracking system to identify and lock onto a specific celestial object.

target_id.description: The ID of the target object (e.g., 'HD-1415-B').

action_set_definitions.name: configure_ccd_cooling
action_set_definitions.description: Sets the target temperature for the CCD sensor cooling system.

target_temperature.description: The target temperature in degrees Celsius.

action_set_definitions.name: toggle_shutter
action_set_definitions.description: Opens or closes the telescope's protective shutter.

state.description: The desired state of the shutter.

action_set_definitions.name: take_science_exposure
action_set_definitions.description: Triggers a high-resolution science exposure frame capture.

state_description.telescope_azimuth: The horizontal angle of the telescope in degrees (0.0 to 359.9).
state_description.telescope_altitude: The vertical angle of the telescope in degrees (0.0 to 90.0).
state_description.shutter_open: Indicates if the telescope's protective shutter is open.
state_description.ccd_temperature: The current temperature of the CCD sensor in degrees Celsius.
state_description.current_time_utc: Current environment time in ISO 8601 format.
state_description.storage_remaining_gb: Available disk space for storing raw observation data.
state_description.tracking_target_id: The ID of the celestial object currently being tracked, or null if idle.
